_comment: Footer data (Milestone 16, site-wide footer). Edit company description/tagline, quick-nav links, social links, or legal links here — index.html never hardcodes them. Contact details (address/phone/WhatsApp/emails/hours) are deliberately NOT duplicated in this file: the footer reads those directly from data/contact.json (single source of truth), reusing the same rendering helpers as the Contact section (assets/js/modules/contact-info.js).

company.description: Watt Security est une entreprise de sécurité privée basée à Douala, dédiée à la protection des entreprises, résidences et événements, 24h/24 et 7j/7.

_social_comment: URLs are placeholders ('#') until real social profiles are confirmed — replace them here only.
_legal_comment: These pages don't exist yet (architecture/PAGE_ARCHITECTURE.md reserves their filenames for a future milestone) — the links intentionally point ahead to where they will live.
